message:
refactor(core): centralize config directory resolution and fix literal tilde fallback

Six call sites duplicated dirs::config_dir().unwrap_or("~/.config").join("ft")
which would create a literal "~" directory on fallback instead of
expanding to the home directory. Extract default_config_dir() and
relative_fallback_config_dir() with a safe relative fallback and
replace all sites in config_profiles, extensions, and rulesets.

Add tests verifying the canonical dir ends in "ft" and contains no
literal tilde.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
